ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "stock_exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with these metrics */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings Ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Book Ratio */,
  "peg_ratio" REAL /* Price/Earnings to Growth Ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on Equity */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on Assets */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend Yield */,
  "bvps" REAL /* Book Value Per Share */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "enterprise_value" REAL /* Enterprise value */,
  "trailing_pe" REAL /* Trailing P/E */,
  "forward_pe" REAL /* Forward P/E */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the financial metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the dashboard */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_widgets" (
  "widget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each widget */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dashboard that the widget is part of */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the widget's metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being displayed */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric being displayed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the widget was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("widget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_widgets_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the alert's metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric being monitored */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator for the alert condition (e.g., ==, !=, >, <) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trigger */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_triggers_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Binary data containing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
